items.title: AccessOwl (YC S22) is hiring an AI TypeScript Engineer to connect 300 SaaS tools
Oura Ring 5 review: Thinner, lighter, better
items.summary: The Ring 5, which Oura describes as the world’s smallest smart ring, is 40% smaller than its predecessor and starts at $399.
